name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Don’t miss your chance --
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Last chance to get your name on the wall. | Friend --

Today's the last day to get your name on the official Donor Wall at headquarters.

**If you 're with me, chip in $1 or more before midnight tonight:

[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/get-on-the-wall/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjMzNDIxODES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyMzU1NTEzS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thanks,

Hillary

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: 🚨🚨 Flash Critical Issues Survey 🚨🚨
body:
LindseyGraham.com

This quick Issues Survey will only take 1 minute.

There are an incredible amount of threats and global issues
facing our country. What are the most critical issues facing our
nation?

Friend,
I want to hear from you.

I just put together this quick 6-question Flash Critical Issues
Survey, and I hope you will follow this link right now to submit
your response.

It will only take 1 minute to share your answers, and Friend,
your opinion matters greatly to me.

Please follow this link now to let me know what you think about
the issues facing our country.

Lindsey Graham

Paid for by Lindsey
Graham 2016

name: Beth Hansen, Campaign Manager
subject: The latest poll and a Major Endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[

](www.JohnKasich.com)
A new poll of New Hampshire Republicans is out today that has **Gov. John Kasich in second place - behind Trump and ahead of Jeb Bush!**

This poll is the third consecutive poll that has Gov. Kasich in double digits and in either second or third place. His conservative message of balanced budgets and a strong national defense is resonating.

**[Peter, please help us keep up the momentum!](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29969254:28722232388:m:1:958431888:16D51029229E5F6CC4F9956A6765B1CB:r)**
[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29969255:28722232388:m:1:958431888:16D51029229E5F6CC4F9956A6765B1CB:r)
**Also, former U.S. Senate Majority Leader Trent Lott announced his endorsement of Gov. Kasich to be President**. [Read more here](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29969256:28722232388:m:1:958431888:16D51029229E5F6CC4F9956A6765B1CB:r). His endorsement comes barely a week after Alabama Gov. Robert Bentley endorsed Gov. Kasich.

Voters all around the country are embracing Gov. Kasich's positive vision for a stronger America.

As Gov. Kasich said during the Fox debate, _**" America is a miracle country. And we have to restore the sense that the miracle will apply to you, each and every one of the people in this country..."**_

**[Peter, with your support, we can win and go on to fix America](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29969254:28722232388:m:1:958431888:16D51029229E5F6CC4F9956A6765B1CB:r)**.

Thanks for your support!
Sincerely,
**Beth Hansen
**Campaign Manager

[

](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29969255:28722232388:m:1:958431888:16D51029229E5F6CC4F9956A6765B1CB:r)

name: Ben Carson
subject: Last chance...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
|
Peter,

Each day I campaign across America, I never want to forget why I am doing this and the importance of our mission.

Our children and grandchildren will be forced to burden our irresponsibility if we don't act quickly. Children born today already have a $60,000 share of our national debt. That is immoral.

**So that I can be reminded of this every day, we have been offering every donor of $50 or more the opportunity to put the name of their child or grandchild on my campaign bus.

**Because so many people have responded, we've decided to extend this offer.

**But now is the last chance.**

[**If you'd like us to include the name of your child or grandchild on my bus, please act now and make a donation of $50 or more.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29971996:28725053592:m:1:876315805:624F5C16601F2A8AD1782471BCB313E7:r)

Together, we will let the whole world know what we're fighting for.

Thanks for your support.

\- Ben | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29971996:28725053592:m:1:876315805:624F5C16601F2A8AD1782471BCB313E7:r)

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Renewing Education
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
Peter,
It's an exciting time of year: Our kids are
heading back to school and millions of young adults are going off
to college.
But the schools they're headed to aren't
nearly as good as they should be. And the burden of going back to
a mediocre school is borne most by those who can afford it least
- the least fortunate kids, who most need a better shot.
Year after year, Democrats just want to throw
more money at our outdated, inefficient system, trying to fix the
problem by legislating from Washington and paying off their
political backers who want to protect the broken status quo at
all costs.
I want an alternative, based on three
important principles:

Restore local control and stop Common
Core
Modernize our higher education system
Give parents a choice

Stopping Common Core: High standards and
great curricula are key parts of a great education, but federal
bureaucrats pushing Common Core should not be meddling in
decisions that can and should be made locally.
As President, I would sweep away the federal
incentives to stick with Common Core and leave all decisions
about curriculum and standards to state and local authorities.
Higher education for the 21st century: Our
colleges and universities are the best in the world, but they're
too expensive, they aren't offering the kind of degrees Americans
really need, and our kids aren't graduating on time.
Hillary Clinton wants to raise taxes and
spend billions on an outdated system. I want to enable colleges
to innovate, bring down the cost of a good degree, and get kids
the education they need to build a New American Century. Read
more about my plan to control costs and spark innovation here.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43584595:18877394633:m:3:1349778030:90862C050C8DE860BDFF3DC01BE16554:r
Choice: Parents and students shouldn't be
stuck in bad schools year after year. Innovative charter schools,
private schools, and religious schools can offer a way out, and
as president I'd do all I can to help parents send their kids to
the right place for them.
Plus, school choice isn't just about giving
families what they want, it also works. The best studies have
repeatedly found that school choice improves outcomes for
students, especially in our cities.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43584596:18877394633:m:3:1349778030:90862C050C8DE860BDFF3DC01BE16554:r
To stay up to date on my ideas for education
and plenty of other issues, follow me on Facebook and Twitter.
To students, parents, grandparents, and
teachers, have a happy school year!
Marco Rubio

Paid for by Marco Rubio for President

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Too many emails? Click here to receive updates less often:
https://marcorubio.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

Unsubscribe: https://marcorubio.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

PO Box 558701 | Miami, FL 33255-8701

But the schools they're headed to aren't nearly as good as they should be. And the burden of going back to a mediocre school is borne most by those who can afford it least - the least fortunate kids, who most need a better shot. Year after year, Democrats just want to throw more money at our outdated, inefficient system, trying to fix the problem by legislating from Washington and paying off their political backers who want to protect the broken status quo at all costs. I want an alternative, based on three important principles: Restore local control and stop Common Core Modernize our higher education system Give parents a choice Stopping Common Core: High standards and great curricula are key parts of a great education, but federal bureaucrats pushing Common Core should not be meddling in decisions that can and should be made locally. As President, I would sweep away the federal incentives to stick with Common Core and leave all decisions about curriculum and standards to state and local authorities. Higher education for the 21st century: Our colleges and universities are the best in the world, but they're too expensive, they aren't offering the kind of degrees Americans really need, and our kids aren't graduating on time. Hillary Clinton wants to raise taxes and spend billions on an outdated system. I want to enable colleges to innovate, bring down the cost of a good degree, and get kids the education they need to build a New American Century. Read more about my plan to control costs and spark innovation here. Choice: Parents and students shouldn't be stuck in bad schools year after year. Innovative charter schools, private schools, and religious schools can offer a way out, and as president I'd do all I can to help parents send their kids to the right place for them. Plus, school choice isn't just about giving families what they want, it also works. The best studies have repeatedly found that school choice improves outcomes for students, especially in our cities. To stay up to date on my ideas for education and plenty of other issues, follow me on Facebook and Twitter. To students, parents, grandparents, and teachers, have a happy school year! name: Katie McGinty
subject: Let me know
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Friend,

I've been blown away by the number of people coming together to support our campaign. And to be clear, this isn't my campaign -- it's our campaign. This race is about all of us working together to take back Pennsylvania's Senate seat from Pat Toomey.

**I 'm running for U.S. Senate because I want to be the voice for you and for all Pennsylvanians.** That's why it's so important to me to know what your priorities are -- so I can advocate for your needs on the floor of the Senate and fight for changes that will make life a little easier for you and your family.

**Friend, will you take a moment to share with me what matters most to you?**
| [Protecting Social Security & Medicare](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7286433771673354240/-4492039362116059136?ms=20150825)
---
| [Raising the minimum wage](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7286433771673354240/-4492039362116059136?ms=20150825)
---
| [Creating manufacturing jobs and stopping unfair trade deals](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7286433771673354240/-4492039362116059136?ms=20150825)
---
| [Expanding civil and voting rights](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7286433771673354240/-4492039362116059136?ms=20150825)
---
| [Advocating for reproductive health](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7286433771673354240/-4492039362116059136?ms=20150825)
---
| [Making higher education more affordable](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7286433771673354240/-4492039362116059136?ms=20150825)
---
| [Investing in clean energy jobs](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7286433771673354240/-4492039362116059136?ms=20150825)
---
| [Protecting LGBT equality](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7286433771673354240/-4492039362116059136?ms=20150825)
---
_[**(Something else? Click here to let me know!)**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7286433771673354240/-4492039362116059136?ms=20150825)_ Pennsylvania deserves a Senator who listens and responds, not a Senator who puts politics ahead of people.

Please, [**let me know what 's nearest to your heart**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7286433771673354240/-4492039362116059136?ms=20150825) so I can keep your needs and concerns at the forefront of this campaign.

Thank you for your input,

Katie
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7286433771673354240/-4347924174040203264?refcode=20150825e&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7286433771673354240/-4564096956153987072).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States
clean_body: Friend, I've been blown away by the number of people coming together to support our campaign. And to be clear, this isn't my campaign -- it's our campaign. This race is about all of us working together to take back Pennsylvania's Senate seat from Pat Toomey. I 'm running for U.S. Senate because I want to be the voice for you and for all Pennsylvanians. That's why it's so important to me to know what your priorities are -- so I can advocate for your needs on the floor of the Senate and fight for changes that will make life a little easier for you and your family. Friend, will you take a moment to share with me what matters most to you? | | | | | | | | Pennsylvania deserves a Senator who listens and responds, not a Senator who puts politics ahead of people. Please, so I can keep your needs and concerns at the forefront of this campaign. Thank you for your input, Katie | | | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: dinner?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Will you join me for dinner? | Friend --

I'd like to get to know you, and I can't think of a better way to do that than sitting down to dinner together.

[**Today, if you add your name, you 'll be entered for the chance to be flown out with a guest to have dinner with me on the campaign trail.**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjMyOTQ5ODES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyMzczNTQ3S0&mt=2&rj=NjIyMzczNTQ1S0&rt=0)

We don't have to talk politics or get too serious -- no homework assignments before this dinner. I just want to know what's on your mind, and I'd like to thank you for being a part of this team.

The campaign will take care of your travel and accommodations, so you can relax and enjoy our time together.

**Add your name right now for the chance to meet me on the campaign trail:**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/dinner-with-hillary/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjMyOTQ5ODES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyMzczNTQ3S0&mt=2&rj=NjIyMzczNTQ1S0&rt=0)**

See you for dinner,

Hillary

| **No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.** Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 8/1/15 and 10/31/15. Enter by contributing [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjMyOTQ5ODES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyMzczNTQ3S0&mt=2&rj=NjIyMzczNTQ1S0&rt=0) or click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjMyOTQ5ODES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyMzczNTQ3S0&mt=2&rj=NjIyMzczNTQ1S0&rt=0) to enter without contributing. One (1) Winner and a guest will receive a special invitation to a campaign dinner event with Hillary Clinton, round-trip airline tickets from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to the location of the campaign event and one (1) night hotel accommodation (approximate retail value of Prizes: $1900). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to [Official Rules](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjMyOTQ5ODES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyMzczNTQ3S0&mt=2&rj=NjIyMzczNTQ1S0&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201. | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjMyOTQ5ODES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyMzczNTQ3S0&mt=2&rj=NjIyMzczNTQ1S0&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ui/modules/display/optOut.jsp?&m=23294981&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&j=NjIyMzczNTQ3S0&mt=2&rj=NjIyMzczNTQ1S0&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjMyOTQ5ODES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyMzczNTQ3S0&mt=2&rj=NjIyMzczNTQ1S0&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjMyOTQ5ODES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyMzczNTQ3S0&mt=2&rj=NjIyMzczNTQ1S0&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjMyOTQ5ODES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyMzczNTQ3S0&mt=2&rj=NjIyMzczNTQ1S0&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjMyOTQ5ODES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyMzczNTQ3S0&mt=2&rj=NjIyMzczNTQ1S0&rt=0)

name: Scott Walker
subject: your card is ready
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Walker Inc
body:
Peter, as one of the most dedicated conservative grassroots leaders, I want you to join our campaign as a Charter Member today. The Charter Membership is an exclusive group of supporters that will help advise our campaign for the White House.
| [](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjMzNTEwMjES1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjIyNDUyMzAxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
---
Peter, as one of the most dedicated conservative grassroots leaders, I want you to join our campaign as a Charter Member today. The Charter Membership is an exclusive group of supporters that will help advise our campaign for the White House. [](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjMzNTEwMjES1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjIyNDUyMzAxS0&mt=1&rt=0) [Join Scott Walker for America with a gift of $30 or more and we'll send you a personalized Charter Membership card right away.](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjMzNTEwMjES1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjIyNDUyMzAxS0&mt=1&rt=0) I hope you will carry this card in your wallet with pride, knowing you are supporting a campaign focused on fighting and winning for you. Under President Obama's failed leadership the federal government has grown by leaps and bounds, while the economy has ground to a halt. Our enemies have become emboldened, while Americans feel less safe, at home and abroad. We are in desperate need of big, bold, conservative reforms that are proven to grow the economy and bring the feeling of safety back to families across the country. If we can fight the liberal special interests and win in a blue state like Wisconsin, we can win for all Americans. Stand with our campaign today. Thank you, Scott Walker [Get Your Card](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjMzNTEwMjES1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjIyNDUyMzAxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjMzNTEwMjES1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjIyNDUyMzAxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjMzNTEwMjES1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjIyNDUyMzAxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
| Paid for by Scott Walker Inc.
[www.ScottWalker.com](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjMzNTEwMjES1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjIyNDUyMzAxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
---
